title: Sass & Belle Bamboo Hedgehog Plate
features: Bring a sprinkle of nature to mealtime with this heart-warming baby plate.
description: Bring a sprinkle of nature to mealtime with this heart-warming baby plate. Made from 100% planet-friendly bamboo, you'll find our happy hedgehog design. A brilliant way to wave goodbye to single-use plastic and have fun at the same time. This item has been hand-polished and crafted from natural bamboo which may cause subtle variations in the colour and engraving, making each one beautifully unique.
